purpose: Route work inside a copied template hierarchy to the smallest correct local guide while keeping live-doc scaffolds inert until localization.
decision_order: Read AGENTS.md first, then the indexed local guide for the subtree you will touch.
Use .agents/AGENTS.md for package-boundary work, docs/AGENTS.md for docs work, and their child guides for narrower ownership.
Keep docs/live inert until a copied repo localizes them into active project truth.
Treat optional skill packages as opt-in, not shipped default truth.

children.name: agent-packages
children.summary: Owns the template agent-package boundary and routes to shipped or optional package inventories.
route_when: The task touches .agents/ package ownership or template package boundaries.
The task needs to decide between shipped and optional template package surfaces.
avoid_when: The task only changes docs under docs/.
The task is active copied-repo runtime work outside the template package.

children.name: shipped-skill-inventory
children.summary: Owns the shipped top-level skill inventory for the template's default surface.
route_when: The task changes the shipped top-level skill package surface.
The task needs the truthful shipped inventory.
avoid_when: The task only changes optional packages.
The task is about docs or live-doc localization rather than package inventory.

children.name: optional-skill-inventory
children.summary: Owns the optional top-level skill inventory and opt-in package semantics.
route_when: The task changes optional package inventory or promotion into shipped truth.
The task needs the truthful optional package list.
avoid_when: The task only changes shipped packages.
The task is about docs or live-doc localization rather than package inventory.

children.name: docs-root
children.summary: Owns the template docs boundary and splits inert live-doc scaffolds from durable reference docs.
route_when: The task touches docs/live or docs/reference inside the copied template.
The task needs to decide whether a docs change is inert scaffold behavior or durable template truth.
avoid_when: The task only changes agent-package inventories under .agents/.
The task is active root repo runtime work rather than template-package maintenance.

children.name: live-doc-scaffolds
children.summary: Owns the inert scaffold contract for template live docs until localization in a copied repo.
route_when: The task changes current-focus, progress, todo, roadmap, runtime, or qa scaffolds inside the template.
The task needs the inert-live-doc rules before localization.
avoid_when: The change is durable template policy.
The task is active copied-repo runtime work after localization.

children.name: reference-docs
children.summary: Owns durable template truth such as boundaries, codemap, memory, implementation, and lessons.
route_when: The task changes durable template policy, paths, boundaries, or reusable lessons.
The task changes the template root contract and needs durable writeback.
avoid_when: The change only updates inert scaffold placeholders.
The task is about active copied-repo runtime progress rather than durable template truth.
